summary: TTS | Navigation options top left when a Team is selected
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user has the Arizona Diamondbacks set as the Favorite Team
AND the user is logged in
AND the user is on the Favorite Team page

steps.action: WHEN the user scrolls to highlight the Arizona Diamondbacks
steps.result: THEN the app should say 'The {selected team} is highlighted. Press select to save this team as your favorite team. Move right, or down to hear additional teams to favorite. Move left to highlight the “Done” button.'
